applyDefaultPenalty(address).notice: Applies default penalty to agent score.

applyRepaymentBonus(address).notice: Applies repayment bonus to agent score.

isScoreValid(address).notice: Returns whether an agent has a non-expired score record.

setOracleSigner(address).notice: Updates trusted oracle signer used for score attestations.

setScore(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Scorer role direct score update hook (used by ZKCreditVerifier and manager policies).

setScorer(address,bool).notice: Grants or revokes scorer role (used by LoanManager for bonus/penalty updates).

submitScore(address,uint256,uint256,byte.notice: Submits a score signed by off-chain trusted oracle.

tierToLtvBps(uint8).notice: Returns max LTV for a tier.
